scope: 6 parallel clusters: README/ROADMAP/CONTRIBUTING rewrite, partner-data scrub, hook portability fix, boot script hardening, tests+CI, dev-workflow softening
notes: 3 stages: parallel clusters, integration (decision files + CHANGELOG), commit+push+CI. Retroactive entry from git history.

scope: Land Boss's drafted v0.2.4 work cleanly. Added init.sh scaffolding + chmod for update-handover.sh (gap Boss missed); added smoke test check_exec for the new hook; bumped VERSION; closed CHANGELOG section
notes: No subagents — Vibe Chief direct integration of Boss-drafted work. First release where canon-level work originated outside Vibe Chief mode.

scope: Port Boss's verified-live PreCompact mechanism into framework canon. Copy pre-compact.sh + compact-boot.sh from live workspace; remove update-handover.sh; rewrite settings.json hooks block (Stop out, PreCompact auto+manual in); scaffold handovers/_pinned/; supersede v0.2.4 decision; new precompact decision; rewrite CLAUDE.md compact-handover section; init.sh scaffold updates; smoke test validation gate (5 new checks); migration script; CHANGELOG v0.2.6 + v0.2.4 supersession note; ROADMAP delta; disposition footer + move feedback to processed/
notes: No subagents — direct port from live workspace source. First full end-to-end use of the v0.2.3 framework-feedback channel: Boss diagnosed + verified live + filed port spec; Vibe Chief read + ported + closed loop.

scope: Audit first Codex boot of Vibe Chief; verify root AGENTS.md worked but generated workspaces lacked Codex-visible AGENTS.md and .codex hook mirrors; add source .codex hook loading CHIEF.md; scaffold AGENTS.md at workspace root, HQ, labs, and projects; scaffold workspace/HQ .codex hooks reusing canonical .claude scripts; extend init-smoke to validate AGENTS files and Codex hook JSON; write decision + README/CLAUDE/CHIEF/ROADMAP/CHANGELOG updates
notes: Direct Vibe Chief implementation in Codex. Verification: tests/init-smoke.sh, source .codex route JSON parse, and .codex JSON/bash syntax pass.

scope: Audit all external-skill mentions (superpowers, gstack, context7, playwright, skill-creator, plus the not-recommended list) for ownership clarity. Add hyperlinks to upstream repos in README. Add explicit framing: these are third-party plugins from the ecosystem; Vibeboss doesn't fork/vendor/maintain them. Rename docs/superpowers/ -> docs/design/ to eliminate naming collision with the actual obra/superpowers project. Sed-replace path references across 20+ files in canon. CLAUDE.md repo-layout diagram fixed manually (sed didn't match cross-line pattern).
notes: Direct work, no subagents. Pre-public-flip cleanup pass. Sed handled bulk; CLAUDE.md layout diagram needed manual edit because the docs/ and superpowers/ tokens appeared on adjacent lines.

scope: Three-layer mechanism so every commit + push is gated against personal data leaks. tools/audit/audit.sh (shape-based detector, --tree/--staged/--history modes), tools/audit/allowlist.txt (patterns only, never literal data), tools/audit/README.md. tools/hooks/pre-commit + tools/install-hooks.sh (idempotent installer with --check). tests/audit-smoke.sh CI wrapper. .github/workflows/ci.yml gains sensitivity-audit parallel job. Decision file documenting the why-shape-not-token discipline. CHANGELOG v0.2.7 entry consolidating the comprehensive pre-public scrub work (file deletes from history via git-filter-repo, text-replace across all commits + messages, real-name -> jkorigin, etc).
notes: Direct work, no subagents. Detector + allowlist + hook + installer + CI wrapper + CI workflow + decision + README + CHANGELOG + ROADMAP + VERSION. Stress-tested against fixture; clean tree passes; injected sensitive shapes caught. Per LESSON-008 self-citation.

scope: 4 parallel clusters: discipline (LESSONS 011 dispatch-tiers + 012 source-tier discipline, protocol sections in CLAUDE.md/per-project-README/CHIEF.md); methodology SKILL + 3 artifact templates (hypothesis/finding/handoff with tier-tagged evidence + Confidence-derivation table); Bun-served lab dashboard (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, ~940 LOC, localhost-bind, atomic frontmatter write-back); integration (init.sh scaffold, migration, smoke test extension, decision file, CHANGELOG v0.3.0 + closes v0.2.7, ROADMAP delta, VERSION bump, calibration entry). Six-principle architecture derived from problem-shape, not vendor-imported from the reference research operation.
notes: 3 parallel subagents (A discipline + B methodology + C dashboard) returned clean; Vibe Chief integrated as D. Largest single ship of the session — first time framework includes UI code (not just markdown + bash). Per LESSON-008 self-citation: prior subagent-cluster + templates runs median 20-30 min wallclock (n=5); this ran longer due to dashboard build dimension.
